sourceRows.Scope: non-Killing internal symmetries and massive gauge bosons
sourceRows.Finding: The route computes classical gauge-boson masses from internal metric geometry and Lie-derivative data, with possible symmetry breaking toward the Standard Model gauge group.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: This is the closest external geometry lead to a direct W/Z mass-source law, but it remains outside GU and does not emit Phase201 source rows.

sourceRows.Scope: chiral interactions of fermions and massive Kaluza-Klein gauge fields
sourceRows.Finding: The 2026 update shows massive light non-Killing gauge fields can have asymmetric left/right fermion couplings and may model weak-force chirality.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: It strengthens the weak-interaction geometry lead, but still lacks observed W/Z eigenstate rows, weak-angle source, and physical scale normalization.

sourceRows.Scope: internal metric dynamics and broken Killing isometries
sourceRows.Finding: The paper proposes that transitions of the internal manifold metric can make gauge bosons of broken Killing isometries massive.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: It is a geometric mass-generation precedent, not a GU-local boson prediction artifact.

sourceRows.Scope: coset-space dimensional reduction and Wilson-flux breaking
sourceRows.Finding: The source surveys E8 coset reductions and Wilson-flux symmetry breaking toward four-dimensional GUT structures.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: It supplies compactification model-building context, not W/Z/H source-lineage rows or GeV normalization.

sourceRows.Scope: six-dimensional gauge-Higgs grand unification mass-spectrum lead
sourceRows.Finding: The source produces electroweak symmetry breaking and a near-observed Higgs mass in a specific warped extra-dimensional model.
sourceRows.PredictionImpact: It overlaps the gauge-Higgs boundary route and remains parameter/model dependent rather than GU-local.

decision: Do not promote W/Z or Higgs physical masses from the Kaluza-Klein internal-symmetry route in this repository. The route is a serious geometric direct-mass lead because non-Killing internal fields and internal metric dynamics can generate massive gauge bosons and weak-like chirality, but it does not supply GU-local W/Z source rows, a GU electroweak embedding and weak-angle source, target-independent scale selection, observed photon/W/Z/H extraction, Higgs scalar-source lineage, or GeV normalization.
nextRequiredArtifact: A GU-local internal-geometry theorem mapping the non-Killing/internal-metric mass formula into observed SU(2)_L x U(1)_Y source rows.
Separate W and Z rows with weak-angle, neutral-mixing, photon projection, and physical-unit normalization independent of target values.
A target-independent weak-scale selection or GU VEV replacement and low-energy transport theorem.
A solved GU Higgs scalar source/operator, self-coupling or excitation lineage, and observed Higgs extraction if the no-ad-hoc-Higgs path is extended to the physical Higgs.
